title: CHILDREN'S MUSEUM OF EASTERN OREGON - 211info
text: CHILDREN'S MUSEUM OF EASTERN OREGON CHILDREN'S MUSEUM OF EASTERN OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of educational exhibits, activities, classes, camps, and special events. 400 S Main Street Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-1pm and 2pm-5pm Email (541) 276-1066 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 276-1066 Main phone Main phone (541) 276-1066 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more information FEES: $8 per person; none for children age 2 and younger. Memberships and discount options available. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-1pm, 2pm-5pm (cleaning pause 1-2pm) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Downtown across from Great Pacific Services: Camps Museums Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment.
